name: octomate
description: OctoMate — an ElizaOS GitHub copilot agent for the Nosana Builders Challenge

scripts.dev: concurrently -n agent,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter agent dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter agent build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter agent lint && pnpm --filter web lint
